'''鈭歯-w-th-s''' ('''kanawthesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dap|dap]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-w-th-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dap|dap]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-w-th-s
|-
! Lemma
| kanawthesoko
|}
